name: his-very-best
description: Jonathan Alter's biography of Jimmy Carter — leading with integrity as an outsider, reinventing after failure, and planting trees you'll never sit under.
useCase: Outsider leadership, integrity under pressure, reinvention after failure, long-term thinking, solving impossible problems through persistence.
knownRisks: Biography by a single author — not a neutral or comprehensive history
Carter's political context (1970s-80s) differs significantly from today
Some may disagree with Alter's assessment of Carter's presidency and post-presidency
